name: Agentic Forecasting using Sequential Bayesian Updating of Linguistic Beliefs

description: arXiv:2604.18576v4 Announce Type: replace Abstract: We present the Bayesian Linguistic Forecaster (BLF), an agentic system for binary forecasting that achieves state-of-the-art performance on the ForecastBench benchmark. The system is built on three ideas. (1) Linguistic belief state: a semi-structured representation combining numerical probability estimates with natural-language evidence summa...
author: Kevin Murphy
